message:
perf(scheduler): reorder task dispatch, cache metrics provider, and inline waker hot paths

ThreeLaneWorker::next_task: reorder Phase 2 ready paths to check the
lock-free fast_queue (O(1) atomic pop) before attempting local_ready
try_lock. The previous ordering paid a mutex try-lock cost on every
iteration before falling through to the atomic fast path. Since
fast_queue receives externally-scheduled ready tasks and is the most
common source of work in multi-worker configurations, checking it first
reduces per-iteration overhead.

Worker: cache the metrics provider Arc at construction time instead of
cloning it from RuntimeState on every task execution. This eliminates an
Arc clone + drop per task poll (2 atomic ops) on the critical execution
path. The cached reference is stored alongside the existing io_driver
and trace handles. Also pre-size seen_io_tokens HashSet(32) and scratch
vectors(16).

schedule_cancel_on_current_local: collapse the two-step has_local +
CURRENT_LOCAL.with into a single CURRENT_LOCAL.with that borrows, checks
Some, and operates, eliminating a redundant TLS access.

Condense verbose multi-line lock().expect() calls in ThreeLaneScheduler
and ThreeLaneWorker helper methods (with_task_table, with_task_table_ref,
snapshot, complete, schedule_ready_finalizers) to single-line form.

Add #[inline] to all waker schedule/wake/wake_by_ref methods
(ThreeLaneWaker, ThreeLaneLocalWaker, CancelLaneWaker,
WorkStealingWaker) and to scheduler utility functions
(schedule_local_task, remove_from_local_ready,
remove_from_current_local_ready, current_worker_id,
schedule_on_current_local, schedule_cancel_on_current_local).

GlobalInjector: add #[inline] to inject_timed.
ThreeLaneScheduler: pre-size local_ready Vec(32).
Parker: condense lock_unpoisoned and park to single-line form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
